content.content:
# Phase 3, Section 1: Example Section

## Scope
- Implement the widget factory
- Add validation via Zod schema
- Wire to the content loader

## Checklist
- [ ] Define WidgetSchema in src/content/schemas/widget.ts
- [ ] Export barrel from index.ts
- [ ] Add loader case for type='widget'
- [ ] Write tests: unit, integration, edge_case
- [ ] Update docs/examples.md

content.thinking: The section scope is clear. Five checklist items. I'll now locate existing schema patterns before drafting discovery.yaml.
